examples.title: Style header, main, and footer
examples.description: Purpose: After you build page sections in HTML, CSS gives each area its own look—colors, spacing, and borders—so the layout feels like a real website. Output: A colored header bar, padded main content, and a subtle footer strip. Try: Change the header background color or add a border to main.
